content:
# Session 20 (iter-020) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- Sorry count: **5 ‚Üí 5** (global 9; no sorry closed, real compiling partial banked on B6-succ).
- Target attempted: `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (B6 succ) via analogist-validated **route (b)**.
- File touched: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (5 edits). Build GREEN (2439 jobs).
- Both highly-recommended review subagents dispatched (prover touched the file): **0 must-fix**.

## What happened ‚Äî route (b) DELIVERED (real progress, no close)
plan-iter-020 fired the iter-019 pre-committed escalation gate: mathlib-analogist (api-alignment)
`whisker-synonym` was consulted FIRST (lean_run_code-VERIFIED), returning **route (b) = ALIGN_WITH_MATHLIB**
(prove whisker-iso functoriality by routing through the proven `_eq` bridges, NOT re-deriving on the
`MonoidalPresheaf X` synonym ‚Äî route (a) = DEAD END). progress-critic `snap-conv-20` = STUCK; the planner
correctly judged a prover round now warranted because the mechanism was *validated end-to-end*, not
speculative. The prover executed it faithfully:

- **STEP 1 ‚Äî 4 private whisker-functoriality helpers (L2028‚Äì2053), all axiom-clean, compile:**
  `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans/_refl`, `tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_trans/_refl`, each
  `rw [..._eq √ón]; apply Iso.ext; simp`. Route (b) confirmed: the `_eq` bridges already absorbed the
  synonym crossing ‚áí residual uniformly `X.Modules`-comp ‚áí `comp_whiskerRight`/`whiskerLeft_comp` fire.
  No `hc` comp-bridge, no synonym re-entry.
- **STEP 2 ‚Äî controlled iso-level distribution (B6-succ, L3181‚Äì3187):** `rw [show tensorPowAdd (k+1) m' =
  <5-segment composite> from rfl]; simp only [tensorPow_succ, tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans]`. Replaces the
  old @3145 explosive `simp only`-to-canonical body (which was *why* `rw [ih]` couldn't fire). **Key
  discovery beyond the analogist sketch:** `tensorPow_succ` is the missing ingredient ‚Äî plain
  `rw [tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans]` won't fire (outer whisker's source differs by IOTA-reduction from
  the unfolded segment's source; `rw` matches at reducible transparency); `erw` fires but over-unfolds
  `tensorObjAssoc` ‚Üí `whnf` heartbeat timeout. `simp only [tensorPow_succ]` FIRST aligns the source, then
  plain `_trans` fires *controlled* (tensorObjAssoc stays folded). LHS now exposes the FOLDED inductive atom.
- **STEP 3 ‚Äî `rw [ih]` fails ("did not find pattern", verified @3207):** the distributed LHS carries the
  DOUBLE whisker `(tensorPowAdd k m' ‚ñ∑ L) ‚ñ∑ L^m''`; `ih` supplies the SINGLE whisker; `tensorPowAdd (k+1+m')
  m''` still folded. This is the **genuine braided pentagon** ‚Äî the effort-breaker target.

## Precise remaining blocker (honest typed sorry @3207)
Close needs three sub-steps: **(i)** unfold `tensorPowAdd (k+1+m') m''` via `Nat.succ_add` dragging an
`eqToIso` reindexer (subst helper mirroring `tensorObjIso_tensorPowAdd_reindex`); **(ii)** at hom level,
`whisker_exchange` + associator-naturality to make `ih`'s LHS literal, then `rw [ih]`; **(iii)** discharge
the canonical coherence by `hexagon_forward` + `pentagon` + `whisker_exchange` (NO `Œ≤=id` ‚Äî both bracketings
are the SAME permutation, which is exactly what separates assoc-‚àÄL from comm).

## No regression
- ‚òÖ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` and B5 `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` re-`lean_verify`'d this pass:
  `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, no `sorryAx`. The 4 new helpers axiom-clean (lvbc).
- B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` untouched (gated). 3 comm untouched (`[IsInvertible L]` FUTURE, no consumer).
- Goal seed `Grassmannian.represents` untouched ‚Äî DELIVERED.

## Verification subagents (both PASS, 0 must-fix)
- **lean-auditor** `iter020` (CLEAN; 0/0/1): 4 helpers genuine non-circular; B6-succ distribution real
  (not cosmetic); `sorry` @3207 honest; NO `maxHeartbeats 1e6` (only justified `800000` @1194/2575); no
  fabricated `axiom`; no statement-weakening. **1 minor**: stale `.lean` parenthetical @3225‚Äì3226 calling B4
  "the single remaining sorry" (B4 closed iter-017) ‚Äî review can't edit `.lean` ‚Üí recommendations.
  Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter020.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter020` (PASS; 0 must-fix / 0 major / 3 minor): Lean faithful both ways;
  comm chain correctly `[IsInvertible L]`-gated (matches blueprint); B6-succ sketch ADEQUATE (names
  hexagon_forward+pentagon+whisker_exchange, no Œ≤=id). Gave the **~31-decl verified-axiom-clean restore
  list** (used below). Minors: (1) 4 helpers + reindexer unreferenced by blueprint (private scaffolding,
  no entry owed); (2) stale `sectionsMul_mul_comm` docstring @3305‚Äì3307 criticizing a blueprint framing that
  no longer exists; (3) `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl` hint to confirm before building comm.
  Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter020.md`.

## ‚öÝ sync_leanok ESCALATED from over-strip to CORRUPTION (7th consecutive iter)
`sync_leanok-state.json`: iter 20, sha 50342ef, **removed 24 / added 0**, only `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`.
This iter the defect is materially WORSE than the prior 6 over-strips: on the **12 proof blocks that carried
a `\uses{}` list**, the sync did not merely strip `\leanok` ‚Äî it **destroyed the `\leanok\uses{` prefix
entirely**, turning `\begin{proof}\leanok\uses{<labels>}` into the malformed `\begin{proof}    <labels>}`
(dangling label list, no `\uses{` opening). The blueprint-doctor flagged these as crash-level: *"plastex
emits `Label '' could not be resolved` ‚Ä¶ leanblueprint depgraph builder enters infinite recursion ‚Ä¶ the
blueprint never finishes building ‚Ä¶ Do NOT defer."* The other 12 closed blocks (prose proofs, no `\uses`)
had `\leanok` cleanly stripped. Total 24 = the reported removal.

**Review manually REPAIRED all 24** (justified override ‚Äî see below). Durable fix is **sync-side and now
urgent** (it is producing build-breaking malformed LaTeX, not just cosmetic marker loss).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: **repaired + restored proof-block `\leanok` on all 24 closed blocks**
  (every one independently `lean_verify`-confirmed axiom-clean ‚Äî `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`,
  no `sorryAx`; module builds green):
  - **12 corrupted `\uses`-bearing headers** restored `\begin{proof}\leanok\uses{‚Ä¶}` (the `\leanok\uses{`
    prefix had been destroyed ‚Üí build-breaking; labels were intact, repair is mechanical/safe):
    L405, L615, L831, L865, L898, L1001, L1174, L1623, L1680, L1754 (‚òÖ-dependent), L1834 (‚òÖ), L1903 (B5).
  - **12 cleanly-stripped prose headers** restored `\begin{proof}\leanok`:
    L659, L743, L930, L960, L1142, L1488, L1521, L1549, L1713, L1800, L1983, L2006.
  - This **also resolves the blueprint-doctor's crash-level "bare-label"/malformed-annotation findings for
    this chapter** (the dangling `label}` fragments are now well-formed `\uses{‚Ä¶}`).
- The **7 bare `\begin{proof}` blocks left untouched** (correctly unmarked): 5 honest sorried decls
  (`tensorPowAdd_assoc` @1367, `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` @1247, `tensorPowAdd_comm` @1311,
  + `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`, `sectionsMul_mul_comm`), the mixed `sectionMul_coherent` block @2121 (bundles
  closed + sorried members), and the 3 unscaffolded assembly targets @2264/2340/2405 (`% NOTE: target
  unscaffolded`).
- No `\lean{‚Ä¶}` renames (no decl renamed). No `\mathlibok` changes. No stale `\notready`. iter-018 `% NOTE`
  on `lem:tensorProductComm_eq_refl_mathlib` (L1195) unchanged.

## Blueprint doctor (iter-020)
- **Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex bare-label / malformed-annotation findings = RESOLVED by the 24-block
  repair above** (they were the symptom of the sync corruption).
- Remaining findings all **out-of-cone / DEFERRED chapters** (merge-back extraction artifacts, not in-loop):
  `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` covers 2 non-existent files; broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` in
  FlatBaseChange / GlueDescent / QuotScheme. Surfaced for the merge-back blueprint round; not edited.

## Coverage debt
- leandag unmatched 332 ‚Üí **336** (+4 = the 4 new `private` whisker helpers). Private ‚áí leave the scan, no
  blueprint entry owed (consistent with the `_eq` bridges + `tensorObjIso_tensorPowAdd_reindex`). Dominated
  by inherited `Grassmannian.*`/`GradedModule.*` parents (out-of-cone). No new in-cone coverage debt.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Route (b) (whisker-functoriality via `_eq` bridges) is the correct, verified mechanism** for the
  whiskering-synonym diamond ‚Äî record for reuse; route (a) (re-expose synonym head) is a documented dead end.
- **`tensorPow_succ`-first source-alignment** is required before plain `rw [tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans]`
  fires (iota-reduction mismatch); `erw` over-unfolds ‚Üí timeout. New reusable idiom.
- B6-succ is now de-risked to a clean braided-pentagon atom with a 3-step recipe ‚Äî ideal effort-breaker seed.
